subject: A large stag with branching antlers stands on rocky ground in a misty violet forest, its coat marked with faintly glowing lines; a small cloaked figure is visible in the upper background
description: A majestic stag dominates the frame, standing proud on mossy rocks. Its coat is a warm reddish-brown, overlaid with faint glowing markings that suggest enchantment or magical transformation. The antlers are large and elaborately branched. The background is a violet and purple-toned misty forest with cascading waterfalls in the mid-ground. Pink-rose magical light particles float in the lower and mid-field. In the upper right, barely visible, is a small hooded figure — likely the caster or witness — rendered small against the massive natural setting. The mood is magical and slightly melancholy, evoking transformation as loss.
foreground: large glowing-marked stag standing on mossy rocks
background: misty violet forest with cascading waterfalls and floating magical particles
emotion: stillness; the stag appears calm yet the glowing marks convey an uncanny transformation just completed
